en: Hey, man, nice pile of bricks you got here.
I'm not offering, I'm asking you if you drink.
ko: 제안하는 게 아니라, 네가 술 마시는지 묻는 거야.

en: You think I give alcohol to teenage drivers taking my daughter out?
ko: 내가 내 딸을 데려가는 10대 운전사에게 술을 주겠다고 생각해?

en: Hey, man, the protective vibe, I dig.
You think the death of Sammy Davis left an opening in the Rat Pack?
ko: 샘미 데이비스의 죽음이 래트 팩에 빈자리를 남겼다고 생각해?

en: You're not letting her go out like that, are you?
ko: 그녀를 그렇게 나가게 두지 않을 거지?

en: Cher, get in here. What's up, Daddy? What the hell is that? A dress. Says who? Calvin Klein.
ko: 셰르, 들어와. 무슨 일이야, 아빠? 그게 뭐야? 드레스야. 누가 그래? 칼빈 클라인.

en: Go upstairs and put something over it.
Sure, I was just going to.
Anything happens to my daughter, I got a .45 and a shovel.
ko: 내 딸에게 무슨 일이 생기면, .45구경 총과 삽이 있어.
